title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options shown with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two would be most effective.

content.task: Discuss the following aspects of risk and courage in people's lives, then decide which two are most important for personal development.
options: Taking physical risks to overcome fear and build confidence
Pursuing ambitious career goals despite uncertainty
Standing up for what you believe in, even when unpopular
Embracing new experiences and stepping outside your comfort zone
Taking financial risks to start a business or make a change

script.text: Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some ideas related to risk, courage and personal development. Discuss the following aspects of risk and courage in people's lives, then decide which two are most important for personal development. You have about two minutes for this, so don't worry if I stop you. Please speak so that we can hear you.
Now decide which two are most important for personal development.
